scripts.ios:run: export LANG=en_US.UTF-8 && export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 && expo run:ios
scripts.ios:run:sync: npm run ios:sync:pods && npm run ios:run
scripts.ios:run:release: export LANG=en_US.UTF-8 && export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 && expo run:ios --configuration Release
scripts.ios:build: export LANG=en_US.UTF-8 && export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 && expo prebuild --platform ios --clean && npm run ios:pod:install
scripts.ios:pod:install: cd ios && export LANG=en_US.UTF-8 && export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 && pod install
scripts.ios:sync:pods: export LANG=en_US.UTF-8 && export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 && expo prebuild --platform ios && npm run ios:pod:install
scripts.ios:metadata: export LANG=en_US.UTF-8 && export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 && cd ios/fastlane && set -a && . ./asc_api_key.env && { [ -f ./asc_review_contact.env ] && . ./asc_review_contact.env || true; } && set +a && fastlane metadata
scripts.ios:metadata:upload: export LANG=en_US.UTF-8 && export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 && cd ios/fastlane && set -a && . ./asc_api_key.env && { [ -f ./asc_review_contact.env ] && . ./asc_review_contact.env || true; } && set +a && fastlane metadata_and_screenshots --verbose
scripts.ios:kill-simulator: killall Simulator 2>/dev/null; killall com.apple.CoreSimulator.CoreSimulatorService 2>/dev/null; xcrun simctl shutdown all 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.ios:clean-cache: npm run ios:kill-simulator; rm -rf ios/build ios/Pods ios/Podfile.lock node_modules/.cache
scripts.ios:screenshots:upload: npm run ios:screenshots:check && export LANG=en_US.UTF-8 && export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 && cd ios/fastlane && set -a && . ./asc_api_key.env && { [ -f ./asc_review_contact.env ] && . ./asc_review_contact.env || true; } && set +a && fastlane screenshots --verbose
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && npm run ios:clean-cache
scripts.fastlane:install: brew list fastlane >/dev/null 2>&1 || brew install fastlane; brew upgrade fastlane 2>/dev/null || true
